The '''''Blue Flame''''' was [[Jagged Fel]]'s first [[Starship/Legends|ship]], a [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|''Nssis''-class Clawcraft]] that he constantly crashed when he was a [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]] at a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy|military academy]] in the [[Rata Nebula/Legends|Rata Nebula]]. This [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was supposedly painted blue to hide its many dents. Jag flew the ''Blue Flame'' against the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] when he and his fellow cadets had to defend the academy from a raid. The ''Blue Flame'' was destroyed in the raid.
